company.name: AutoStream
company.description: AutoStream is an AI-powered SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators.

policies.details: AutoStream offers a 7-day money-back guarantee. Refunds are not available after 7 days.
24/7 live chat support is exclusively for Pro Plan subscribers. Basic Plan gets email support with 48-hour response time.
Users can cancel at any time. Cancellation takes effect at end of billing cycle.
14-day free trial for new Pro Plan users. No credit card required.
For teams larger than 3 users, contact sales@autostream.io for custom pricing.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: Exports are optimized for YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok, Facebook, and LinkedIn.

faqs.question: Do I need video editing experience?
faqs.answer: Not at all. AutoStream is beginner-friendly and AI handles the heavy lifting.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade?
faqs.answer: Yes, anytime from your account settings.

faqs.question: Is my data secure?
faqs.answer: Yes. AutoStream uses AES-256 encryption and never uses your videos for AI training without consent.
